profile.title: Your Profile
about.title: About NKO University
about.mission_body: NKO Online University is dedicated to preserving and spreading the N'Ko language and African cultural heritage through modern technology. Founded by Karlang Diate, we believe every person of African heritage deserves access to quality language education.
about.ai_body: Every lesson, quiz, and tutoring session is carefully crafted and available 24/7, in multiple languages, at zero cost.
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Quality education should be free for everyone.
pricing.free_desc: Complete access to all courses, expert tutor, and quizzes.
pricing.donate_desc: Help us grow and reach more students across Africa and beyond.
pricing.free_features: All 6 levels | Expert Tutor | Quizzes | Progress tracking | Certificate
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to know anything about N'Ko before starting?
faq.a1: Not at all! Level 1 starts from absolute zero — the history of the script, the alphabet, and basic sounds.
faq.a2: Yes. All courses, lessons, quizzes, and the expert tutor are completely free. You can optionally donate to support our mission.
faq.q3: Which languages is the platform available in?
faq.a3: The platform UI and expert tutor support English, French, Arabic, Portuguese, Spanish, and N'Ko itself.
faq.a4: The tutor is context-aware — it knows your current lesson and level, and answers your questions in your preferred language.
faq.a5: Yes! The platform is mobile-first and works on all devices.
